Row.Text: Competitive multiplayer balance that preserves each identity while reducing runaway snowball numbers.

Set.Text: Equal Footing: Mastery science and culture loops are reduced to slow runaway scaling while preserving Ada's mastery identity.
Equal Footing: City growth bonus reduced; specialist science identity preserved.
Equal Footing: Xerxes keeps conquest and empire gold tempo with reduced burst rewards.
Equal Footing: Tecumseh keeps city-state scaling with reduced Dominion and yield snowballing.
